mapper.select: SELECT id, name, path, component, icon, parent_id, sort_order, type, permission_code, is_visible, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, path, component, icon, parent_id, sort_order, type, permission_code, is_visible, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_menu WHERE path = #{path} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_menu (id, name, path, component, icon, parent_id, sort_order, type, permission_code, is_visible, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{type}, #{permissionCode}, #{isVisible}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_menu SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_menu WHERE path = #{path} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_menu WHERE path = #{path} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
